headline: Texas Capital Initiates Globe Life (GL) With Buy Rating and $170 Price Target
summary: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL) is one of the 15 Set-It-and-Forget-It Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 19, 2026, Globe Life Inc.’s (NYSE:GL) coverage was initiated at Texas Capital. The firm assigned a Buy rating to the stock and set a price target of $170. Citing the continued growth of the company’s life and health […]

headline: Is Globe Life (GL) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness And Strong Earnings Metrics
summary: If you are wondering whether Globe Life at around US$135.11 is offering real value or just looks expensive on the surface, the key is to look past the headline price and into how it is being valued. The stock has seen mixed returns, with a 1.2% decline over the last 7 days, a 6.3% decline over 30 days, a 2.4% decline year to date, but a 5.0% return over 1 year and 25.7% and 42.5% over 3 and 5 years respectively. Recent coverage of Globe Life has focused on its role as a large US life and...
